I’ll never see the product or the refund. Stay away!

I called china post and they said they have not received any package for that tracking or have not received any items to be delivered to my address. So disappointed.  Do not use this service.

The buyer canceled on my order without a notice. Then shopee took more than a week to refund my money. I've been chatting with a few customers service and last i called them. But none of then come back with a solution. Different customers service gave me different information. Keep saying it'll take 1-7 days. From November 2nd until November 11, there's no action. When worst i called, one of the customer service told he don't he any enquiry in my account. The most terrible experience with shopee.

My order issue was marked urgent, but no one followed up for days. The seller keeps ignoring me and support only keeps saying ‘we’ll coordinate with the team.’ Really disappointing for an urgent case.

I’m absolutely furious and disgusted at how Shopee has handled my return. I scheduled a return for a heavy chair on 30th July 2025 for pickup on the 1st August 2025.   Every day from 1st August to the 4th, they sent me automated WhatsApp messages, saying someone would be in touch on the day of pickup, or the next day if not, but no one ever contacted me. No calls. No messages. Nothing. For four days.   I was home all that time, waiting for a courier who never showed up even once. I finally reached out to customer service, who told me they’d escalate it and mark it as urgent. I contacted customer service three times. One agent even told me to just message a random Shopee delivery guy in my Shopee Chats and asked them to pick up. I followed this wild advice too, and out of 4 delivery guys I contacted, only one replied, explaining to me that they’re unable to pick up the item without an instruction from Shopee. Fine. This time, I decided to contact customer service on Facebook.   After some back and forth, the agent suggested that I rescheduled, so I followed their advice. I generated a new tracking number on the 4th of August 2025 at 6PM-ish.  Then the next morning at around 11AM, I get an update in the app saying:  “Multiple failed attempts have been made to pick up your item. Pickups will no longer be made.”  This is an outright lie. Nobody came. Nobody attempted. I was home the entire time. I didn’t miss a single doorbell ring, or I didn’t even get a call or a Whatsapp message because there weren’t any.   Shopee Logistics falsified service records to make it look like they tried and failed, just so they could wash their hands clean off the pickup. That is dishonest, manipulative, and frankly, a disgusting way to treat customers.   I contacted customer service again. This time, the condescendingly told me to ensure that this event should not be "repeated in the future’. What do you mean "should not be repeated in the future" ??? Shouldn’t YOU be the one who shouldn’t be repeating this in the future?!???????? I sat at home for five whole days waiting for you and in the end what did you do?! You outright falsified service records lying about attempting pickup multiple times but you never came?! I’ve never met such a disgusting response!  After wasting my time and giving me nothing but automated replies and lies, they now want me to handle the return manually. For a heavy item. That they promised would be picked up for free. Why would I ever buy from you again when your “easy return” promise turns out to mean you do everything yourself and get blamed when their team doesn't show up? FIVE DAYS I WAITED. And this is your resolution for me.   This chair has a manufacturer defect where there were no holes at the back of the right side of the chair for installation of the screws! Do you think I could accept this?! How do you expect me to accept an unfunctionable, unusable item like this? Are you seriously forcing me to keep something that is defective by default? Isn’t that an outright scam?!  This is a complete disgusting display of failed service, failed due diligence, false reporting of service records, and complete disregard for customer time and responsibility. Falsifying pickup status on the Shopee app is a serious breach. Do you understand that it isn’t just bad service, but it is fraudulent behavior?! Absolutely vile.
a lot of bad courier and sellers, but yeah take the risk, research and compare well especially in reviews but shopee is still good tho, you only need to be more extra extra careful.

Shopee is totally not care about customer feedback. The help centre is just for seek of to have help centre without any sincere service. Issue had been raised but the service crew is not playing the proper in solving customer issues and just closed the case without alignment or confirmation from customer on issue solved. Am really surprised a MNC company not maintaining a professional service crew.

They have different websites for each country and you cannot use the same email to authorise on different countries websites! So if you travel across Southest Asia, you need one email for Malaysia, one for Thailand, etc! As well as you cannot install mobile apps for Thai Shopee, if you're AppStore account isn't in Thailand. Extremely bad approach. On Lazada it's possible just to switch from one country to another.Aside from that, many good products with reasonable prices are available there.

I had high hopes for shopee.qa, but unfortunately, my experience was disappointing. The product I ordered arrived late, and when it finally did, it wasn’t as described on the website. Customer service was slow to respond and didn’t offer much help resolving the issue. For a site that advertises convenience and reliability, this really missed the mark. I hope they improve their service and product quality in the future
Shopee lacks buyer protection, frequently siding with sellers and leaving buyers vulnerable to scams

I asked for a return and refund on a fake wrong supplement product sent. Customer service said they would send a voucher as compensation. They did not. This site is full of scammers and counterfeit products. I speak amont local Bali expats about Shoppee and they all say it is unreliable. They don't know how to service customers from all the scammers selling stuff on their site or they just don't care. Shameful!

wasnt sure how this thing worked I ordered a item and paid I thought that was that but after a while i received a email about storage costs shortly followed an enormous shipping cost bill The item cost a couple of pounds but the shiping was 25 pounds I finished up paying 30 pounds for a 2 quid item I would avoid these people!

Licenced Loan Shark Shopee is my story.I have been a long time buyer ever since Covid days. Then they have this instalment payments with zero interest, which I utilise as its gonna be the same price. After that I think introduce the 14 days free return, not sure which come first. Anyway, the most recent case was when i bought the RM900 beauty products which i realised its not as per in the photo, i returned immediately on the same day thinking i am in safe hands. Shopee took like 2 weeks to review and suddenly just send back to me and said its rejected. I have to keep texting as there is NO bloody number to call. Then the agent suggests to send back again and i wrote to the seller and they said its Shopp’s decision not theirs. Who is telling the truth i dont know. As my product is in 3 months instalment, I paid the first two months and then I forgot the 3rd month. Oh my Gawd, they call non stop , like 20 times per day,  as if i owe them 3 million. Now i fully understand how those loan sharks act and Shopee is a licenced LOAN SHARK. They can reject when you return goods even they claim its 14 days free return and then chase you like crazy. Shopee must be giving a lot of job opportunities to telemarketers and debt collectors. Big companies can do what they want and we consumers are just nothing to them.

I am writing to express my frustration…I am writing to express my frustration regarding the recent banning of my Shopee account, which I have been unable to resolve despite numerous attempts to contact your customer service team. My account has been banned, and I have not received any clear explanation for this action. In addition, I have been waiting for almost five days for a response to my concern, even though I was initially told I would receive feedback within 24-28 hours.I have tried reaching out to your support team several times through both email and the live chat feature, but I am either left waiting or receive no meaningful response. As a result, I am left in the dark about the status of my account and orders. The inability to access my account is causing significant issues, especially because I cannot track my orders or view any important information related to past purchases.Furthermore, all of my account details were verified, and I have ensured that I followed Shopee's guidelines. This makes it even more confusing why my account was banned without any notification or detailed explanation. I believe I should be given proper communication and a clearer understanding of what is happening with my account.I am kindly requesting a clear explanation of why my account was banned, immediate access to my account so that I can track my orders, and an urgent response from your customer support team within 24 hours. I also request better communication from Shopee in terms of providing updates regarding my account status.I have attached relevant evidence, including screenshots of emails and chat logs, to support my case. I hope that this matter will be taken seriously and resolved promptly.Thank you for your attention to this issue. I look forward to your immediate response.

The Shopee customer service just simply change the reason to customer change or mind and asking return and refund! Hey Customer receive fake item and the problem was customer side? customer change or mind? directly side at Mall seller help them change to customer change or mind and return? this is why Shopee so many fake item around because of this type of customer service! and there is no way you can rate this Customer service after he handle this problem and they send you the 24 hours time frame for rating the outcome but believe me I receive the email 3 hours from now but you cannot making rating on this CS service the link become error after you click! so this mean you has no way to complaint this CS too! but I just contact another Shopee CS to raise this issue and hope not all Shopee CS is same training or the problem is not CS but Shopee?

I purchased the product on the 10th, received it on the 12th, tried it on the 13th but couldn't use it due to network problems, clicked the return button on the 14th, mailed it back to the merchant on the morning of the 15th, the merchant received it on the 18th, but on the 20th they said the product had been used and no refund was available. It clearly stated there was 15 days for free return and refund, then today, the 26th, I clicked to confirm the return with the Shopee customer service this afternoon, but I couldn't file a new appeal even though it was clearly not my order. So be cautious when buying things on Shopee.

I applied for seller account and came to know how ignorant and arrogant their backend team is. They didn't know about visa types in Malaysia like Mm2h and keep telling me that it's temporary visa. I had sent them immigration link to convince but rather than reading and acknowledging my shared information. They were stuck in loop that temporary visa. God saved me from them. I worry that If my account was approved and I had problem with any transaction ,they won't help because they can't read and comprehend anything. I am better off without them. Currently I had not given any control to them over me ,they were behaving like this. Had I empowered them, they would be extremely difficult to deal with. Not knowing is not a problem, not willing to learn is an actual problem.

The worst online shopping platform. Poor product quality, unreliable seller, unreasonable price, and difficult returns - after two such experiences, he finally lost trust in it. Everyone also tries to avoid using it.

I used to like Shopee as it finally made online shopping popular like in other countries many years ago. Unfortunately it's getting more and more unreliable! I'm only buer there. Very often delivery date is not kept as promised. We buyers cannot do anything. Waiting 3-4 days for the order to come and when you finally cannot wait any more they can only give you refund. Or 5rm voucher that you cannot use. They give you the option "next day delivery" but there is high possibility they cannot deliver next day, so late evening the AI can offer you refund. But I need a product not refund!!! The law is not customer friendly at all. Probably many sellers also suffer.

Dear All,I just got scammed by the seller / delivery guy in the following way:I ordered tyre valve caps and there was a delay in delivery with the delivery guy stating I asked for a different delivery date on the updates which I did not.Then the delivery guy calls me and says that he misplaced my item and now has found it but could I click as received so that he won't get into trouble for the late delivery and he will deliver the item tomorrow.I didn't want him to get into trouble so I obliged. The next day when the item was delivered, what I got was 2 light bulbs and not 4 tyre valve caps.Since I had already clicked to release payment it would be futile to complain to Shopee and the valve caps were only RM8.Moral of the story is never click "received" until you open and check the item no matter what sob story the delivery guy says!

Shopee, you are the biggest legalized scam in the e-commerce world.You built your platform on a win-lose model, where Shopee always wins—and sellers always lose.You lure buyers with endless "free returns," discounts, coins, and guarantees—but who’s actually paying the price? Sellers.We bleed from sky-high commissions, mandatory campaigns, and platform vouchers we never agreed to. And yet, you keep pushing more and more, while giving buyers false confidence.And worst of all? You let buyers abuse the system—✅ They use the product.✅ They damage it.✅ Then they return it.And what does Shopee do? You side with the buyer, no questions asked.Sellers end up paying for warranty claims, return shipping, and even refunding used or broken items. You take your cut no matter what happens. I’m really thankful and lucky that I’ve had a positive experience so far using Shopee.com.myI’ve never been a seller on Shopee so this is from a customer’s point of view.Vendors encompass three types: 1. Shopee Mall sellers, 2. Shopee Preferred Sellers and 3. [the regular] sellersMost times you wouldn’t be ‘talking’ to vendors. You’ll be pinged that your order has been packed and registered under [courier]. You get the item and that’s it. There are some that take pictures of your order right before shipping out. Automated responses rustles my jimmies, and I’m glad I don’t encounter them often. And with those situations where issues with my order has arisen, most have been cordial, prompt and straightforward with communicating to me that my order cannot be fulfilled. ‘Worst’ case scenario is a sudden cancellation of my order. And I’ve gotten my money refunded. QOLShopee itself has added QOL aspects, which is why I’ve bumped this up to 3 stars. Just as of last year (?) they’ve extended the time frame to make reviews, and have now allowed follow-up reviews (this is especially great for those who’ve bought skincare - which requires months of use before you can see some results) Another feature that’s finally added is the individual product listing review. Shopee used to force customers to review in batches, bought a bunch of stuff from one shop? You’re gonna have to review all those things in one go. Shipping service - SPX ExpressShopee couriers that visit my area have been satisfactory. Parcel tracking is updated and the couriers have been sure to send me a message when my parcel has been delivered.Maybe I’ve been a saint in my past life but I’d say I’ve gotten majority of my items ordered delivered in good condition and delivery speed has been most satisfactory. (Within the acceptable timeframes from where it’s being shipped and all that)App vs website experienceWith the occasional hanging of the app and when on the website, it did take a few refreshes to be normal again. I wish that the wishlist or liked items were accessible from the website, and not just the app. This is another QOL feature I’d like to have.Shopee reviews2/10 times do I see ‘quality reviews’. Rarely am I informed enough unless I really dig through the reviews for some semblance of a proper assessment.  People stick to uploading random videos and pictures, spamming ‘mantap’ or ‘terbaik’ just to receive the 5 coin incentive when making a review. Or I get bad reviews with full 5 stars. Shopee used to allow ratings for overall service (this includes products, seller service AND courier service), but now Shopee lets you rate them individually (Thank fk)

So I thought, "okay, I'll just keep them in the freezer then try them to confirm whether they're actually spoiled". Fried them and they were, indeed, spoiled. Asked for a refund ; shopee rejected it, saying they had the right to try and make 3 deliveries before they could be held responsible. Also gave me the stupid excuse that since the items were "already cooked", that meant I conceded that I received the items in good condition. Reported to KPDN and they somehow fooled the investigator with all sorts of lies. Then again, can't expect much from government agencies these days. I'm not even going to bother taking this to the Consumer's Tribunal for that amount.Everything they do, they do it half-heartedly or even in bad faith. This was the last straw, and I'm shifting to another e-commerce platform. Hope you choke on my money, shopee.

I was flagged by shopeepay for verification. According to Jeremy Jaime, their person to handle DTI complaints, is that it is that the  bangko sentral initiates verification and not them which is very questionable. First my cash ins are measly ammount 2k to 3k and all disbursed to paying orders made through shopee. Second I am not a financial institution and the BSP's jurisdiction are bank regulations. Even with anti money laundering checks I was only cashing in for 2k and 3k and disbursed through order payments. The reason for this is so that they could get your BANK DETAILS during the verification process. I stood my ground and never gave it until they told me you can give your GCASH details. Now I have left shopee altogetther. Even GCASH has not asked me for bank details and it is a more robust E-wallet then shopeepay. SO be careful, do not give your bank details as it is your right to not divulge your bank details.
